mano_cua.result_summary: SVG图标fill颜色显示正确：标签关闭按钮fill=rgb(51,51,51)深灰色继承自currentColor与标签前景色一致，插件安装按钮fill=rgb(255,255,255)白色与按钮文字色一致，颜色应用正常无异常
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Tag close button SVG: Fill is rgb(51,51,51) (dark gray/near black) - inherits from tag text color. Tag background is yellow/golden (#EECC66). Dark icon on yellow background = CORRECT. Get more plugins button SVG: Fill is rgb(255,255,255) (white) - inherits from button text color. Button background is blue/green. White icon on colored button = CORRECT. Both SVG icons inherit fill from currentColor which is properly set by CSS. Fill colors appear CORRECTLY applied and coordinated with backgrounds.
